| Starter |

As Anaxagoras prepared for bed, he couldn't help but smile softly to himself, his eyes crinkling at the corners as he gazed upon the dromas plushies scattered across his pillow. He carefully hung his detached-sleeved jacket and capelet in the closet, ensuring the golden embellishments didn't get damaged.

Donning his soft blue dromas onesie, he felt a wave of comfort wash over him, the plush material enveloping his lithe frame like a warm hug. He ran his fingers through his long green hair, loosening the ponytail and allowing it to cascade down his back in loose waves.

Climbing into bed, Anaxagoras pulled the dromas-patterned blankets from under the bed- he keeps them there, as he would never dare let anyone lay their eyes upon it- and tucked it up to his chin, nuzzling into the plush pillows. He closed his eyes, a content sigh escaping his lips as he drifted off to sleep- which was quickly interrupted by his phone ringing. Great. Must be a student..
